title: Bunjee Jumping | #shorts
full_text: Mom, can I go bungee jumping? >> No, absolutely not. Are you Have you lost your mind here? >> But Scott went and he said it was so much fun. >> No, Scott went. No, but why would Scott ever go? Whose parents allowed this? >> His parents encouraged him to do it. They're the reason he did it. >> They obviously don't love him.
